items.title: P1 BE: follow-suit validation
items.body:
Repo: server
Branch: codex/dev-follow-suit-validation-be
Branch evaluation: repo=server, base=dev, task-branch-required=yes, branch=codex/dev-follow-suit-validation-be, PR target expected=dev
Goal: enforce server-authoritative follow-suit validation + coherent error semantics.

items.title: P1 FE: playable-cards guard
items.body:
Repo: app
Branch: codex/dev-follow-suit-ui-guard-fe
Branch evaluation: repo=app, base=dev, task-branch-required=yes, branch=codex/dev-follow-suit-ui-guard-fe, PR target expected=dev
Goal: UI playable-cards guard with aligned backend error handling.
